title: German Practice Management FHIR Profiles (R4)
introduction: FHIR R4 profiles and extensions for German ambulatory practice management (Praxisverwaltung) — billing (EBM/GOA), budget management (RLV/QZV), remittance (Honorarbescheid), queue management, AI provenance (EU AI Act), and administrative workflows.

list.desc: Continuous Integration Build (latest in version control)
STU 1 — First Standardized Test Use with 154 extensions, 27 realistic examples, and 0 blocking errors
